metadata.name: Reconfigure — Lizard Blades attaches then unattaches (CR 702.151)
metadata.description: Tests the Reconfigure mechanic (CR 702.151) using Lizard Blades ({1}{R}, Artifact Creature — Equipment Lizard 1/1, Double strike, Reconfigure {2}). Phase 1: Lizard Blades starts on the battlefield as a 1/1 artifact creature. P1 activates Reconfigure (ability_index 0 — the attach ability) paying {2}, targeting Monastery Swiftspear. After the ability resolves, Lizard Blades is no longer a creature (CR 702.151b — Layer 4 removes creature type while attached), and Monastery Swiftspear gains +1/+1 and double strike from Lizard Blades' static continuous effects (layer 7c and layer 6). Phase 2: P1 activates Reconfigure again (ability_index 1 — the unattach ability) paying {2}. After resolution, Lizard Blades detaches and becomes a creature again (is_reconfigured clears, Layer 4 effect stops applying), reverting to its 1/1 Artifact Creature — Equipment Lizard status with double strike. Monastery Swiftspear loses the +1/+1 and double strike bonuses.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.151a: Reconfigure represents two sorcery-speed activated abilities. The harness (replay_harness.rs enrich_spec_from_def) expands AbilityDefinition::Reconfigure into two ActivatedAbility entries in order: (0) attach (AttachEquipment effect, targets a creature you control) and (1) unattach (DetachEquipment effect, no target). Both cost {2} generic for Lizard Blades. Neither ability is a mana ability, so both go on the stack and require priority passes to resolve. CR 702.151b: While attached (is_reconfigured=true on the GameObject), Lizard Blades is not a creature — Layer 4 removes the Creature card type. The +1/+1 bonus (two separate Static abilities — ModifyPower 1 and ModifyToughness 1, both layer 7c via PtModify) and double strike grant (Static ability, layer 6 Ability layer, AddKeyword(DoubleStrike), filter AttachedCreature) apply to the equipped creature. Initial state: Lizard Blades (1/1 Artifact Creature, Double strike) and Monastery Swiftspear (1/2 Haste, Prowess) on P1 battlefield. P1 mana pool has colorless:4 (covers two {2} activations). Mana_paid uses 'colorless':2 for generic {2}. ability_index 0 = attach (with target), ability_index 1 = unattach (no target needed). Stack assertions: each activation places the ability on stack (count=1), then resolves to empty. The script does not directly assert creature-type removal (not in the harness assertion schema), but tests that the flow activates and resolves correctly. Final state: stack empty, both Lizard Blades and Monastery Swiftspear on P1 battlefield.

script.step_note: P1 activates Reconfigure (attach) on Lizard Blades, targeting Monastery Swiftspear. Pays {2}. Ability goes on stack, resolves, Lizard Blades attaches and stops being a creature.

actions.description: Initial: Lizard Blades and Monastery Swiftspear on P1 battlefield; stack empty; P1 has 4 colorless mana
actions.note: Lizard Blades is an Artifact Creature — Equipment Lizard 1/1 with Double strike and Reconfigure {2}. Monastery Swiftspear is a 1/2 Haste, Prowess creature. P1 has 4 colorless mana available (two {2} activations).

CR 702.151a: P1 activates Reconfigure attach ability (ability_index 0 — first ability expanded from AbilityDefinition::Reconfigure). Pays {2} generic. Targets Monastery Swiftspear (creature P1 controls). Ability placed on stack. Sorcery speed: legal in main phase with empty stack.

actions.description: After activating Reconfigure (attach): ability on stack (count=1); Lizard Blades and Monastery Swiftspear still on battlefield
actions.note: CR 702.151a: Reconfigure is an activated ability (not a mana ability) — it goes on the stack. Lizard Blades stays on battlefield (equipment/reconfigure permanents never move to stack). P1 has 2 colorless mana remaining.

CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves. CR 608.2: Reconfigure attach ability resolves. Effect::AttachEquipment fires: Lizard Blades attaches to Monastery Swiftspear (is_reconfigured=true on the GameObject). CR 702.151b: While attached, Lizard Blades is no longer a creature — Layer 4 removes Creature card type. CR 613.1f: Layer 6 static effect (AddKeyword DoubleStrike, filter AttachedCreature) now grants double strike to Monastery Swiftspear. CR 613.4c: Layer 7c static effects (ModifyPower+1, ModifyToughness+1) grant +1/+1 to Monastery Swiftspear.

resolution.note: CR 702.151a: Reconfigure attach resolves. Lizard Blades attaches to Monastery Swiftspear. CR 702.151b: is_reconfigured set to true — Layer 4 removes Creature type from Lizard Blades. CR 613.4c: +1/+1 granted to Swiftspear (2/3). CR 613.1f: Double strike granted to Swiftspear.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Reconfigure attach ability resolves. Informational only.

actions.description: After Reconfigure attaches: stack empty; Lizard Blades and Monastery Swiftspear still on P1 battlefield
actions.note: CR 702.151b: Lizard Blades is attached to Monastery Swiftspear (is_reconfigured=true). It is no longer a creature (Layer 4 removes Creature type). Monastery Swiftspear now has +1/+1 from Lizard Blades' static effects (layer 7c) and double strike (layer 6). Both permanents remain on P1 battlefield. P1 has 2 colorless mana remaining.

script.step_note: P1 activates Reconfigure (unattach) on Lizard Blades. Pays {2}. Ability resolves, Lizard Blades detaches and becomes a creature again.

actions.note: CR 702.151a: P1 activates Reconfigure unattach ability (ability_index 1 — second ability expanded from AbilityDefinition::Reconfigure). Pays {2} generic. No target needed (DetachEquipment effect targets the source itself). Legal: Lizard Blades is currently attached (is_reconfigured=true). Sorcery speed: legal in main phase.

actions.description: After activating Reconfigure (unattach): ability on stack (count=1); both permanents still on battlefield
actions.note: Unattach ability is on the stack. Lizard Blades is still attached (is_reconfigured=true) until the ability resolves.

CR 116.3: Both players pass — unattach ability resolves. CR 608.2: Effect::DetachEquipment fires: is_reconfigured set to false. CR 702.151b: Layer 4 effect no longer applies — Lizard Blades regains Creature card type. CR 613.4c / CR 613.1f: Static effects (AttachedCreature filter) no longer apply to Monastery Swiftspear — Swiftspear loses +1/+1 and double strike.

resolution.note: CR 702.151a: Reconfigure unattach resolves. Lizard Blades detaches from Monastery Swiftspear. CR 702.151b: is_reconfigured cleared — Lizard Blades regains Creature type (1/1 Artifact Creature — Equipment Lizard). CR 613.1f / 613.4c: Monastery Swiftspear loses +1/+1 and double strike bonuses (AttachedCreature filter no longer matches).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Reconfigure unattach resolves. Informational only.

actions.description: Final state: stack empty; Lizard Blades unattached and a creature again; Monastery Swiftspear on battlefield; P1 and P2 both at 40 life
actions.note: CR 702.151b: Lizard Blades is no longer attached (is_reconfigured=false) — it regains Creature card type and is once again a 1/1 Artifact Creature — Equipment Lizard with Double strike. Monastery Swiftspear reverts to its base stats (1/2 Haste, Prowess). No life changes occurred during this script. Both players remain at 40 life.
